debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
⊢ AEMeasurable (fun ω => u \ X ω) P

proof:
by
    have hm : Measurable (fun (s : Set ι) => u \ s) := by
      refine measurable_set_iff.mpr ?_
      intro a
      simp only [Set.mem_diff]
      by_cases ha : a ∈ u
      · simp only [ha, true_and]; exact (measurable_pi_apply a).comp measurable_compl
      · simp [ha]
    exact hm.comp_aemeasurable hX.aemeasurable
successful_attempts:
by
    have hm : Measurable (fun (s : Set ι) => u \ s) := by
      refine measurable_set_iff.mpr ?_
      intro a
      simp only [Set.mem_diff]
      by_cases ha : a ∈ u
      · simp only [ha, true_and]; exact (measurable_pi_apply a).comp measurable_compl
      · simp [ha]
    exact hm.comp_aemeasurable hX.aemeasurable
